'''Krystal''' was a [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Gender/Legends|male]] who served as a [[Senator/Legends|senator]] under the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]] of [[Palpatine/Legends|Palpatine]]. He represented the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] of [[Malastare/Legends|Malastare]] in the [[Imperial Senate/Legends|Imperial Senate]]. The professional [[Gambling/Legends|gambler]] and notorious womanizer [[Lando Calrissian/Legends|Lando Calrissian]] once dated [[Krystal's daughter|his daughter]].<ref name="T&B" />
